description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Configurator that runs on push to master and development branches, on pull requests to those branches, and allows manual triggering. The workflow has a matrix job that builds on windows-latest with Python 3.8 and 3.12, and on macos-latest with Python 3.11. For each job, check out the repository, run a custom build-pyinstaller action with the specified Python version, and upload the resulting artifact.
